title: UK REACH authorisation for Tyco Electronics UK Ltd, 10 June 2025
body: "Decision on an application for authorisation (review report) under UK REACH.  Substance name    Chromium trioxide    Authorised use    The industrial use of chromium trioxide in conversion coating and passivation of circular and rectangular connectors in order to meet the requirements of international standards and special requirements of industries subject to harsh environments.   Holder of the authorisation and authorisation number    Tyco Electronics UK Limited (UKREACH/25/13/00)    Date of decision    10 June 2025   "
